name: dice_default_message
value:
Welcome to Dice game bot
!dice help

name: dice_default_admin_message
value:
Welcome to Dice game bot
!dice admin help

name: dice_game_created
value: 🎮 The game has been created for {count} players! You have 30 seconds to join - send !dice join

name: dice_game_wrong_creation
value: (n) You must specify a balance. Send "!dice new <balance>"

name: dice_game_invalid_balance
value: (n) The balance must be a multiple of 500 and less than or equal to 5000

name: dice_game_already_created
value: (n) There is already a game created. Send "!dice join" to join

name: dice_game_already_started
value: (n) There is already a game in progress. Please wait for it to end

name: dice_game_not_exist
value: (n) There is no game available right now. Send "!dice new <balance>" to create a new game

name: dice_game_player_not_found
value:
(n) You have not joined the game
{nickname} ({id})

name: dice_game_started
value:
🎮 The game has started! The players are:

{list}

name: dice_game_guessing_phase
value: /me 🎯 You have 15 seconds to guess a number between 1 and 50!

name: dice_game_player_turn
dice_game_player_did_not_pick
value:
(n) You didn't choose your opponent, so this round will be skipped
{nickname} ({id})

name: dice_game_auto_pick_opponent
dice_game_correct_guess_reward
value:
🥳 Congratulations! You guessed the correct number and will be rewarded with 500 points!

{nickname} ({id})

name: dice_game_betting_phase
value:
💰 Your balance: {balance}
Please select your bet amount in multiples of 500

name: dice_game_betting_all_in
value: 💰 Your balance: 500 - All your balance will be bet

name: dice_game_round_draw
value: 🔄 It's a draw! The round will be replayed

name: dice_game_player_eliminated
value: You have been eliminated. Better luck next time!

name: dice_game_winner_announcement
value:
🎉🏆 Congratulations to the winner: {nickname} ({id})

🥈 Other participants:{list}

name: dice_game_invalid_bet_amount
value: (n) The bet amount must be a multiple of 500

name: dice_player_rank_display
value:
📊 Your rank and total points:

🏅 Rank: {rank}
⭐ Total: {total} points
{nickname} ({id})

name: dice_player_no_score
value:
📊 You currently have no points in this bot
{nickname} ({id})

name: dice_admin_help_message
value: ➕ !dice admin join <group ID> - Join a specific group
🔄 !dice admin refresh - Update last active date for all groups
📊 !dice admin count - Get total group count
📋 !dice admin status - Check channel inactivity status

value.msg: The bot has been successfully joined.
This group requires you to have earned a higher user level.
You've joined the maximum permitted number of groups.
This group no longer seems to exist.
It seems that you're banned from this group.
It looks like you're already in this group!
This group is restricted to new users.
Perhaps you've created too many accounts?
This group can only be joined from a game.

name: dice_auto_leave_message
value: /me 👋 Sorry! You haven't played for the past five days, so I'm leaving this channel. Hope to see you again!

name: dice_maintenance_report
dice_message_admin_join_log
value:
/alert ⚙️ Admin Action

• Command: Join
• Admin: {adminNickname} ({adminID})
• Channel: [{channelName}] ({channelID})

name: dice_player_no_statistics
value: (n) You don't have enough data yet. Play some games and try again!

name: dice_admin_unauthorized
value: /me (n) You are not authorized to use this command

name: dice_owner_only_command
value: (n) Only the game owner can use this command

name: dice_admin_channel_status
dice_admin_channel_not_tracked
value: /me ℹ️ Channel {channelId} is not being tracked yet. The bot needs to receive a command first.
